user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Apple
Product type: AirPods Pro wireless earbuds
Tone: innovative, premium, minimalist
Visual style: Clean, sleek visuals with a focus on white space and product close-ups that emphasize modernity and sophistication.
Conceptual technique: lifestyle aspiration storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Soundtrack of Your Silence
brief.caption: A serene morning scene where a woman jogs through a tranquil forest, oblivious to the chirping birds around her, thanks to the noise-canceling feature of AirPods Pro. The product is subtly visible in her ears as sunlight filters through the trees.
brief.visual_style: Clean, sleek visuals with a focus on white space and product close-ups that emphasize modernity and sophistication.
brief.typography_style: San Francisco (Apple's custom sans-serif), sleek and modern
brief.color_scheme: pristine white, soft forest green, and subtle earth tones
